name: RetentionCohortAnalyzer

neutralConcepts: periodDays must match configured retention window from FREEDOM config key: warehouse_retention_period_days
periodDays must never be hardcoded in service code

ironRules.rule: Retention cohorts are tenant-scoped — cross-tenant retention analysis is forbidden.
periodDays MUST match FREEDOM config key 'warehouse_retention_period_days'. Hardcoded periodDays is a MACHINE violation.

keywords: retention cohort analyzer tenant scoped periodDays FREEDOM config warehouse_retention_period_days RetentionCohortGenerated
